steps.expected: File exists and contains Effect service definition
steps.observed: File exists, 206 lines, complete Effect service definition

steps.action: Check for FirecrawlService tag export using Context.GenericTag
steps.observed: Found: export const FirecrawlService = Context.GenericTag<FirecrawlServiceShape>('FirecrawlService')
Found: export const FirecrawlLive = Layer.effect(FirecrawlService, Effect.gen(function* () { ... }))

steps.action: Check for scrape method in service interface
steps.observed: Found: readonly scrape: (url: string) => Effect.Effect<ScrapedPage, FirecrawlError>

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. All services (Firecrawl, MistralOcr, GeminiPdf, GoogleSheets, GoogleCalendar, Gmail) are properly defined as Effect services with Context.GenericTag service tags, Layer.effect live layers, Data.TaggedError typed errors, and all required methods present in their service interfaces.
